title: gossypium harknessii subsp. armourianum
intro: Gossypium harknessii subsp. armourianum is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Gossypium harknessii plant, which is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is part of the cotton plant family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Gossypium harknessii subsp. armourianum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
